name: LabArchives Electronic Lab Notebook API
what_it_does: LabArchives cloud electronic laboratory notebook (ELN) REST API for research data management, experiment documentation, and scientific collaboration. Enables AI agents to manage notebook entry creation and scientific data capture for research documentation automation, handle file attachment and raw data storage for experimental record keeping, access notebook sharing and collaboration workflow for multi-lab research coordination, retrieve experiment search and metadata tagging for scientific data discovery, manage user and group permissions for laboratory access control automation, handle data export and format conversion for scientific data sharing, access audit trail and version history for research data integrity verification, retrieve widget and structured data entry for standardized experiment templates, manage IP documentation and timestamped records for patent protection, and integrate LabArchives with LIMS, instrument software, and research data management platforms.
use_cases: Capturing experiment notes from research documentation agents
Documenting IP from patent protection agents
Sharing research data from collaboration agents
Archiving lab records from compliance agents
not_for: FDA-regulated GxP manufacturing (use validated LIMS like LabVantage)
High-throughput sample management without ELN focus
Large pharmaceutical enterprise without academic/research orientation
best_when: An academic research lab, university core facility, government research institution, or industry R&D team wanting AI agents to automate experiment documentation, research data capture, IP timestamping, and scientific collaboration workflows in a cloud ELN.
avoid_when: 21 CFR PART 11 FOR FDA-REGULATED RESEARCH: LabArchives offers academic and research ELN; use in FDA-regulated IND/NDA research requires Part 11-compliant electronic records configuration and validation; default academic configuration does not meet FDA regulatory submission requirements without additional configuration and validation. IP documentation timestamping — automated notebook entries used to establish invention conception dates for patent interference must include verifiable timestamps and corroborating signatures; automated entries without proper witness signature workflow may not satisfy patent documentation evidentiary standards. FERPA for student research data — university lab use with student researcher data must comply with FERPA student record protections; automated access to student-attributed research records requires FERPA-compliant access controls.

auth.notes: LabArchives uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. REST API with JSON. Carlsbad, California HQ. Founded 2009. Private (acquired by Danaher 2023). Danaher Life Sciences portfolio alongside IDBS. Academic and research ELN leader. 500,000+ researchers across 600+ institutions globally. NIH-funded institutions. Competes with Benchling (industry) and RSpace for academic ELN.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for individual researchers; institutional site license for team features
pricing.paid_tiers: Individual and institutional site licensing; academic discounts available
pricing.notes: Carlsbad CA. Danaher Life Sciences (acquired 2023). Founded 2009. 500,000+ researchers. 600+ institutions. NIH-funded institutions. Academic and research focus. Freemium for individuals.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per institutional agreement

known_agent_gotchas: IP DOCUMENTATION TIMESTAMP RELIABILITY: Automated notebook entries used to support patent conception date claims must include verifiable UTC timestamps from LabArchives server; automated entries with only client-side timestamps may not satisfy patent documentation evidentiary standards for prior art and conception date

Danaher acquisition API continuity — LabArchives was acquired by Danaher in 2023 alongside IDBS; verify current API roadmap and whether LabArchives will be consolidated into broader Danaher life sciences platform; plan migration contingency before long-term integration investment
No webhooks — notebook entry creation, sharing event, and workflow completion require polling; no push notification for collaborative research event triggers

FERPA student data access controls — automated multi-user notebook access in university lab settings must respect FERPA controls for student researchers; service account access to student-attributed research records without FERPA authorization creates compliance violation

GxP configuration gap for regulated research — default LabArchives configuration is designed for academic use; deploying automated workflows in FDA IND/NDA research context requires 21 CFR Part 11-compliant configuration with electronic signature binding and audit trail hardening

File attachment size limits — automated instrument data file upload via LabArchives API may hit file size limits for large raw instrument files (e.g., mass spectrometry, next-gen sequencing); implement chunked upload and verify file size limits per plan tier
agent_readiness.security_notes: Academic ELN. SOC2, GDPR, FERPA. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Research data and experiment records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Research ELN. SOC2, GDPR, FERPA. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Experiment and IP documentation data.
